11. Payment of maximum bonus- (1) Where in respect of 
any accounting year referred to in Section 10, the allocable 
surplus exceeds the amount of minimum bonus payable 
to the employees under that section, the employer shall, 
in lieu of such minimum bonus, be bound to pay to every 
employee in respect of that accounting year bonus which 
shall be an amount in proportion to the salary or wage 
earned by the employee during the accounting year subject 
to a maximum of twenty per cent of such salary or wage.
(2) In computing the allocable surplus under this section, the 
amount set on or the amount set off under the provisions 
of Section 15 shall be taken into account in accordance 
with the provisions of that section.
